hero.name: Valentin Roehle
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer
hero.tagline: I create highly accessible and visually precise digital interfaces for the web.

about.description: I'm a developer with a strong sense for design and an uncompromising focus on technical quality. My passion lies in crafting accessible, pixel-perfect user interfaces that not only look great but are also performant, maintainable, and user-friendly.
about.description2: The most exciting work for me happens where design meets development at the intersection where visual clarity, technical excellence, and real user experience come together. I think in components, optimize for load times, accessibility, and interaction—without ever losing sight of the bigger picture.
about.currentWork: I am currently completing my training as an application development specialist (Fachinformatiker fur Anwendungsentwicklung) at AimWay GmbH. As part of my apprenticeship, I support the development and maintenance of UI components for the frontend of our platform, Sonar.

contact.heading: Let's work together
contact.description: Open for freelance projects, collaborations, and exciting challenges. Feel free to reach out.

liability.title: Disclaimer
liability.contentText: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with §7(1) DDG. However, according to §§8 to 10 DDG, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity. Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general laws remain unaffected. However, liability in this regard is only possible from the time of knowledge of a specific legal violation. Upon becoming aware of such violations, we will remove this content immediately.
liability.linksText: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot accept any liability for this third-party content. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages. The linked pages were checked for possible legal violations at the time of linking. Illegal content was not recognizable at the time of linking. However, permanent content control of the linked pages is not reasonable without concrete evidence of a legal violation. Upon becoming aware of legal violations, we will remove such links immediately.
liability.copyrightText: The content and works on these pages created by the site operator are subject to German copyright law. Duplication, processing, distribution, and any kind of use outside the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the respective author or creator. Downloads and copies of this page are only permitted for private, non-commercial use.

responsible.title: 1. Responsible Party
responsible.text: The responsible party for data processing on this website is:

general.title: 2. General Information on Data Processing
general.text: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy. The use of our website is generally possible without providing personal data.

contactForm.title: 3. Contact Form
contactForm.text: When you use our contact form, we process the following data: name, email address, subject, and message. This data is processed exclusively for the purpose of responding to your inquiry. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent via the checkbox on the form). You can revoke your consent at any time. The data will be deleted after your inquiry has been processed, at the latest after 6 months.

emailService.title: 4. Email Service Provider
emailService.text: We use Resend Inc. as our email service provider for processing contact form submissions. Resend processes the data on our behalf based on a data processing agreement (DPA). Server location: USA. Legal basis for the transfer: EU-US Data Privacy Framework. For more information, see: https://resend.com/legal/privacy-policy.

captcha.title: 5. Spam Protection
captcha.text: This website uses Cloudflare Turnstile to protect the contact form from automated abuse. When submitting the form, a token is sent to Cloudflare, Inc. (101 Townsend St, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA) for verification. Cloudflare does not process personal data and does not set cookies. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in protecting against spam). More information: https://www.cloudflare.com/privacypolicy/

hosting.title: 6. Hosting
hosting.text: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA. When you visit our website, Vercel processes the request data necessary for the delivery of the website. For more information, see the Vercel Privacy Policy at https://vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy.

analytics.title: 7. Vercel Analytics
analytics.text: This website uses Vercel Analytics and Vercel Speed Insights for anonymous, aggregated collection of page views and web vital metrics. No cookies are set and no personal data is collected. The data serves exclusively for technical optimization. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in website optimization). More information: https://vercel.com/docs/analytics/privacy-policy

storage.title: 8. Technically Necessary Storage
storage.text: This website stores your language preference (key: 'i18nextLng') and theme preference (key: 'theme') in the browser's local storage. This is technically necessary for the functioning of the bilingual website and theme selection, and does not require consent pursuant to §25(2) TDDDG. No cookies are set for this purpose.

fonts.title: 9. Fonts
fonts.text: This website uses the Inter typeface. The fonts are downloaded from Google servers during the build process via next/font and then bundled locally. When you visit our website, no connection to Google servers is established — the fonts are served exclusively from our own server.

github.title: 10. GitHub API
github.text: This website retrieves project data from the GitHub API via a server-side proxy route. Your browser does not communicate directly with GitHub. No visitor data is transmitted to GitHub.

rights.title: 11. Your Rights
rights.text: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
rights.restriction: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)

complaint.title: 12. Right to Lodge a Complaint
complaint.text: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority if you believe that the processing of your personal data violates the GDPR.

errors.notFoundText: The requested page does not exist or has been moved.
